data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Alias threading verified end-to-end: KnotRecord.alias/aliases → toBeat() with normalizeAliases() → Beat/BeatDependency/WaveBeat/CascadeDescendant types → 7 view components (beat-columns, beat-detail-lightbox, cascade-close-dialog, dep-tree, relationship-picker, retakes-view, wave-planner). All use consistent 'alias ?? fallbackId' display pattern. Tests cover alias mapping (3 cases) and cascade passthrough (2 cases). Quality gates: tsc clean, 1975 tests pass, build succeeds, no new lint errors. OpenAPI schemas updated.
